description: A designed square graphic from ICE's 'THE WORST FIRST' arrest-card series, using the identical template as the rest of the set. Background is a high-contrast black-and-white close-up of two open hands in metal handcuffs, with a dark gradient on the left for legibility. Top-left light-cyan small-caps serif headline 'ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL' with white subline '2/14/2025 | San Diego, CA'. Red diagonal corner banner top-right reads 'SAN DIEGO' in white serif caps. Large bold white sans-serif name at mid-left: 'Mirna Elisabeth Villatra-Rivas'. Below, bold white 'CRIMES' label and a bullet: 'Drug trafficking'. Bottom-left bears the round DHS seal and white 'ICE' wordmark; bottom-right a red box with '-THE- WORST FIRST'. The image again substitutes a generic handcuffed-hands stock photo for a real mugshot, attaching name and alleged offense. Propaganda technique: emotionally charged crime framing plus city-specific tagging to maximize local engagement and portray ICE as removing dangerous criminals. Target audience: general public and regional media supporting the deportation agenda.
notable_text: ARRESTED AND PENDING REMOVAL; 2/14/2025 | San Diego, CA; Mirna Elisabeth Villatra-Rivas; CRIMES: Drug trafficking; SAN DIEGO; -THE- WORST FIRST; ICE
